name: 21_Iris_Classification_SVM_Iris_ML
query: Ninaomba mradi wa kuainisha aina za iris kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Iris na kisanidi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kilichotekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Mradi unapaswa kusawazisha data na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`. Itarekodi usahihi wa uainishaji na kuihifadhi kama `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt`, na itazalisha na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia itaunda programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`. Ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, na maelezo mafupi ya modeli kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

requirements.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiwaruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza kwa urahisi vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa modeli.
Maelezo mafupi ya modeli yanapaswa kujumuishwa kwenye ukurasa wa wavuti, kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence does not demonstrate that the Iris dataset is used. The `data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a generic dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}` with no reference to the Iris dataset. The trajectory evidence mentions `load_iris` from `sklearn.datasets`, but this is explicitly stated as "for reference only and does not serve as decisive evidence." The actual code files shown do not contain any import or usage of the Iris dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation. It defines a `load_dataset()` function that returns a static dictionary and a `build_transforms()` function, but it does not contain any actual code for performing feature selection to identify important features. The file's content shows no algorithms (like statistical tests, model-based importance, or correlation analysis) or logic for selecting features from the Iris dataset. The environment feedback confirms successful execution but does not provide evidence of feature selection functionality being implemented.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided content of `src/model.py` does not contain an actual implementation of an SVM classifier. The file only contains placeholder code with requirement definitions and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no import of SVM-related libraries (e.g., scikit-learn), no class definition for an SVM model, and no training or prediction logic. The file structure and keywords mention "SVM classifier," but the code itself does not implement one.

<UNSATISFIED>
The file `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt` contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which does not represent a valid classification accuracy metric. The requirement is to have the actual accuracy value saved, not a placeholder.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The confusion matrix file `confusion_matrix.png` was created and saved, but the key evidence shows an error when attempting to read it: "No endpoints found that support image input". While the trajectory indicates the file was saved without immediate errors, the inability to read or verify its content means we cannot confirm it was successfully generated and saved in a usable format. The requirement is not fully satisfied due to lack of verifiable output.

judge_stats.criteria: Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The `src/app.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation with placeholder code that returns a dictionary. It does not create an actual interactive Streamlit web application that loads classification results, displays model performance, or showcases figures from `results/figures/`. The file lacks any Streamlit components (e.g., `st.title`, `st.write`, `st.image`), data loading logic, or visualization code. While the environment feedback indicates the file executed without runtime errors, the implementation does not fulfill the functional requirement of showcasing classification results and model performance.
